features.name: Spider Climb
features.description: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Ambush Predator - Stealthy climber with poison bite
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Spider Climb for ceiling ambushes
tactical_info.key_abilities: High stealth for ambushes, poison damage ignores armor
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low HP makes it vulnerable once detected
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect for ambush tactics and difficult terrain control
